title: dactylis glomerata var. capitellata
intro: Dactylis glomerata var. capitellata, also known as orchard grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dactylis glomerata var. capitellata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
